CDCdata 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with CDCdata

Package index

All functions

build_request()
Build a base request to the CDC API
cdc_app_token() cdc_set_token() cdc_get_token()
Set and Get App token from CDC
cdc_browse()
Open Dataset in Browser
cdc_categories()
List Available Categories
cdc_columns()
Get Column Names for a Dataset
cdc_count()
Get Row Count for a Dataset
cdc_datasets()
Search CDC Datasets
cdc_datasets_category()
Search Datasets by Category
cdc_datasets_tag()
Search Datasets by Tag
cdc_distinct()
Get Distinct Values for a Column
cdc_fetch()
Fetch Large CDC Datasets with Pagination
cdc_metadata()
Get Dataset Metadata
cdc_preview()
Preview Dataset Sample
cdc_query()
Query a CDC Dataset
cdc_tags()
List Available Tags
perform_request()
Perform API request and parse response

Developed by Patrick Rekieta.
